step_rationale: BCL-6 suppression by miR-155 reduces anti-inflammatory control of immune responses.
mechanism: BCL-6 is an miR-155 target that dampens inflammatory signaling; its suppression permits plaque inflammation amplification.

references.title: microRNA-155 Is Decreased During Atherosclerosis Regression and Is Increased in Urinary Extracellular Vesicles During Atherosclerosis Progression.
